details.test: Task 2: Create account and follow host with >=10 episodes
Task 3: Favorite and start highest-rated Daily Reflection episode at 10:00
Task 4: Subscribe to largest series and queue latest episode
Task 5: Queue short Daily Reflection episodes newest->oldest
Task 7: Subscribe to weekly newsletter with 3 topics
Task 8: Add shorter and longer episodes to favorites and 'Study' playlist
Task 9: Rate popular episode 5 stars and comment
